title: salvia verbenaca var. sabulicola
intro: Salvia verbenaca var. sabulicola, also known as sand sage or sand clary, is a perennial plant species belonging to the mint family Lamiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Salvia verbenaca var. sabulicola include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and promoting healing. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and infusing the leaves to make teas, tinctures, or salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
